lines: India versus Pakistan. Cricket only. Who wins?
Start with World Cups. India leads with two ODI World Cups. Pakistan has one.
In T20 World Cups, India also leads with two titles. Pakistan has one.
Champions Trophy is tighter. Pakistan has one major edge there.
Head to head history across formats is mixed, but India has dominated the biggest World Cup meetings.
Star power and batting depth also give India a strong modern advantage.
Pakistan still has explosive pace bowling and can beat anyone on the day.
But if the question is who owns the bigger cricket resume, India comes out ahead.
So in the cricket rivalry, Pakistan is always dangerous. But the numbers still lean India.

seo.title: India vs Pakistan — Cricket Powerhouse? 🏏
seo.description:
India vs Pakistan cricket comparison: World Cups, T20 titles, Champions Trophy, head-to-head record, and modern cricket strength.
